category_sources: Official WWWOFFLE homepage describes it as a proxy server for browsing and reading pages without remaining connected.
source_facts.description says WWWOFFLE improves browsing for computers with intermittent connections.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and FAQ use WWWOFFLE.
source_facts.name is wwwoffle, the package/executable spelling.
docs_sources: Official FAQ says it is available on the WWWOFFLE homepage and provides detailed usage help.
Official WWWOFFLE homepage has a Documentation section and links README and FAQ.
repo_sources: Official WWWOFFLE homepage Subversion section gives the svn checkout URL for source code.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists proxy caching for HTTP, FTP, offline browsing, recursive fetching, and cache management features.
source_facts.executables lists wwwoffle command-line tools and wwwoffled daemon.
